description: Manage individual secrets in the Microsoft.PowerShell.SecretStore vault, including creating, updating, removing, and exporting secrets.

embedded.title: SecretStore Secret
embedded.description: Manages individual secrets in the Microsoft.PowerShell.SecretStore vault on Windows. Supports creating, updating, removing, and exporting secrets with optional metadata.

name.title: Secret name
name.description: The name of the secret. Required for get and set operations. For export, this is optional and wildcards (*) are supported.

secretType.title: Secret type
secretType.description: The type of the secret. Read-only; returned by get and export operations.

value.title: Secret value
value.description: The value to set for the secret. Used only during set operations. Never returned by get or export.

vaultName.title: Vault name
vaultName.description: The name of the vault to use. Defaults to the SecretStore default vault if not specified.

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Key-value metadata associated with the secret.

_exist.title: Exists
_exist.description: Indicates whether the secret exists or should exist. Set to false to remove a secret.
